chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-142 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A. No.9340/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.04.2022. Mr. Rasool Bakhsh & R.B Solangi, Advocate for the applicant. == The applicant by making an application under section 517 Cr.P.C has sought for final disposal of the Car involved in F.I.R No.193 of 2018 U/S: 279, 320 P.P.C, P.S. Tando Ghulam Hyder, it was dismissed by learned Sessions Judge, Tando Muhammad Khan vide order dated 10.07.2020, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by preferring the instant criminal revision application. On asking learned counsel for the applicant was fair enough to admit that the report of the police for disposal of the very case under ‘C’ Class is pending for its disposal before the Magistrate having jurisdiction. If it is so, then no final disposal of the case property could be made. No wrong has been committed by learned Sessions Judge Tando Muhammad Khan by dismissing the application of the applicant by way of impugned order which may justify this Court to make interference with it. In view of above, the instant criminal revision application fails and it is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
